title: WorktreeStatus
description:
Status of a worktree including runtime state.

Extends worktree information with dirty state, HEAD commit, and ahead/behind counts.

ahead.description: Number of commits ahead of base branch. `None` when the base ref is missing.

base_branch.description: The base branch this worktree was created from (from metadata).

behind.description: Number of commits behind base branch. `None` when the base ref is missing.

branch.description: The git branch checked out in this worktree.

dirty.description: Whether the worktree has uncommitted changes.

path.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory.

spec_slug.description: The spec slug this worktree is associated with.

warnings.description: Warnings about degraded status (e.g., missing base ref).
